query:
-- المستأجرون
INSERT INTO tenants (name, phone, phone2, email, nationalId, nationality, occupation, paymentRating, propertyRating, cooperationRating, overallRating, isActive) VALUES
('خالد بن أحمد المطيري', '0561234567', NULL, 'khaled@example.com', '1234509876', 'سعودي', 'مهندس', 5, 5, 5, 5.00, 1),
('عبدالله بن سعد القحطاني', '0562345678', '0572345678', NULL, '9876501234', 'سعودي', 'معلم', 4, 5, 4, 4.33, 1),

('فهد بن محمد الرشيدي', '0566789012', NULL, NULL, '3344501234', 'سعودي', 'رجل أعمال', 2, 3, 3, 2.67, 1);

-- العقود
INSERT INTO contracts (contractNumber, type, propertyId, unitId, tenantId, ownerId, rentAmount, rentPeriod, startDate, endDate, depositAmount, status) VALUES

('CNT-2024-002', 'rent', 1, 2, 2, 1, 1600.00, 'annual', '2024-03-01', '2025-03-01', 3200.00, 'active'),
('CNT-2024-003', 'rent', 1, 4, 3, 1, 1900.00, 'annual', '2024-02-01', '2025-02-01', 3800.00, 'active'),
('CNT-2024-004', 'rent', 1, 5, 4, 1, 1650.00, 'annual', '2024-06-01', '2025-06-01', 3300.00, 'active'),
('CNT-2024-005', 'rent', 3, NULL, 5, 2, 3200.00, 'annual', '2024-04-01', '2025-04-01', 6400.00, 'active'),
('CNT-2024-006', 'rent', 1, 7, 6, 1, 1950.00, 'annual', '2023-09-01', '2024-09-01', 3900.00, 'expired'),
('CNT-2024-007', 'rent', 1, 9, 1, 1, 1500.00, 'annual', '2024-05-01', '2025-05-01', 3000.00, 'active');
